title: Nakhon Si Thammarat, Nakhon Si Thammarat — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nakhon Si Thammarat, Nakhon Si Thammarat: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nakhon Si Thammarat is a city in Nakhon Si Thammarat with a population of 120,000. An ancient southern city with a rich history, stunning temples, and one of the lowest costs of living in Thailand, ideal for those seeking authentic Thai culture.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
